meta.description: 30 discovered harmony parameters from semantic learning

chord_types.description: Frequencies and preferences for different chord types

parameters.name: major_chord_frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of major triads in the piece
parameters.interpretation: How often major chords appear relative to all chords
parameters.musical_meaning: High values indicate major tonality or bright harmonic character

parameters.name: minor_chord_frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of minor triads in the piece
parameters.interpretation: How often minor chords appear relative to all chords
parameters.musical_meaning: High values indicate minor tonality or darker harmonic character

parameters.name: dominant_7th_frequency
parameters.interpretation: Presence of dominant function and tension-resolution
parameters.musical_meaning: Common in jazz, blues, and functional harmony

parameters.name: extended_chord_frequency
parameters.interpretation: Harmonic complexity and color beyond basic triads and 7ths
parameters.musical_meaning: High in jazz, impressionist, and contemporary music

parameters.name: altered_chord_frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of altered dominant chords (b9, #9, #11, b13)
parameters.interpretation: Use of chromatic alterations for color and tension
parameters.musical_meaning: Characteristic of bebop, modern jazz, and chromatic harmony

parameters.name: voicing_spread_preference
parameters.description: Preference for wide vs. close voicings (normalized 0-1)
parameters.interpretation: 0 = very close (within octave), 1 = very wide (4+ octaves)
parameters.musical_meaning: Wide voicings common in big band, close in piano comping

parameters.name: close_position_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of chords voiced in close position (within an octave)
parameters.interpretation: Proportion of chords with all notes within one octave
parameters.musical_meaning: High in piano music, lower in orchestral settings

parameters.name: drop_2_usage
parameters.interpretation: Use of drop-2 voicings (2nd voice from top dropped octave)
parameters.musical_meaning: Common in jazz piano and guitar, characteristic big band sound

parameters.name: drop_3_usage
parameters.interpretation: Use of drop-3 voicings (3rd voice from top dropped octave)
parameters.musical_meaning: Less common than drop-2, creates specific bass motion

parameters.name: rootless_voicing_ratio
parameters.interpretation: How often chord root is omitted in voicing
parameters.musical_meaning: Common in jazz comping when bassist plays root

parameters.name: ii_V_I_frequency
parameters.interpretation: Occurrence rate of the fundamental jazz progression
parameters.musical_meaning: Cornerstone of tonal jazz and functional harmony

parameters.name: circle_of_fifths_adherence
parameters.description: Adherence to circle of fifths root motion
parameters.interpretation: How often chord changes follow descending fifth patterns
parameters.musical_meaning: Strong functional harmony vs. modal or chromatic

parameters.name: chromatic_movement
parameters.interpretation: How often chord roots move by half or whole step
parameters.musical_meaning: Chromatic harmony, voice leading, or transitional passages

parameters.name: parallel_motion_ratio
parameters.interpretation: How often chords move in parallel motion (planing)
parameters.musical_meaning: Characteristic of impressionism, modal jazz, and modern music

parameters.name: modal_interchange_usage
parameters.interpretation: Borrowing chords from parallel major/minor or other modes
parameters.musical_meaning: Harmonic color from mixing major/minor or modal scales

parameters.name: voice_leading_smoothness
parameters.description: Overall smoothness of voice leading (minimal motion)
parameters.interpretation: How efficiently voices move between chords (0=jumpy, 1=smooth)
parameters.musical_meaning: Central to good part-writing and baroque counterpoint

parameters.name: contrary_motion_preference
parameters.description: Preference for contrary motion between voices
parameters.interpretation: How often voices move in opposite directions
parameters.musical_meaning: Hallmark of good counterpoint, creates independence

parameters.name: voice_crossing_frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of voices crossing each other
parameters.interpretation: How often lower voice temporarily moves above higher voice
parameters.musical_meaning: More common in complex counterpoint, less in block chords

parameters.name: half_step_resolution_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of leading tone and tendency tone resolutions
parameters.interpretation: How often half-step tensions resolve properly
parameters.musical_meaning: Adherence to tonal voice leading principles

parameters.name: tritone_resolution_adherence
parameters.interpretation: How often tritones resolve by half-step contrary motion
parameters.musical_meaning: Core of dominant-tonic relationship in functional harmony

harmonic_rhythm.description: Timing and pacing of harmonic changes

parameters.name: chord_change_rate
parameters.description: Rate of harmonic changes (chords per second)
parameters.interpretation: How frequently harmony changes
parameters.musical_meaning: Fast in bebop, slow in modal jazz and ballads

parameters.name: harmonic_anticipation
parameters.interpretation: How often melody anticipates the next chord
parameters.musical_meaning: Creates forward motion and melodic interest

parameters.name: harmonic_suspension
parameters.interpretation: How often non-chord tones suspend from previous chord
parameters.musical_meaning: Baroque and classical device for creating tension

parameters.name: pedal_tone_usage
parameters.description: Frequency and duration of pedal points
parameters.interpretation: How often a bass note sustains through changing harmony
parameters.musical_meaning: Creates tension and release, common in organ and orchestral music

parameters.name: harmonic_density
parameters.interpretation: Combination of chord complexity and change rate
parameters.musical_meaning: High in complex jazz, low in simple folk or modal music

extensions_tension.description: Use of chord extensions and tension notes

parameters.name: ninth_usage
parameters.interpretation: How often chords include 9th (major or minor)
parameters.musical_meaning: Adds color and complexity, ubiquitous in jazz

parameters.name: eleventh_usage
parameters.interpretation: How often chords include 11th (natural or #11)
parameters.musical_meaning: Creates color and sophistication, careful use to avoid clashes

parameters.name: thirteenth_usage
parameters.interpretation: How often chords include 13th (major or minor)
parameters.musical_meaning: Maximum extension before doubling octave, rich harmony

parameters.name: tension_resolution_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of tensions that resolve properly
parameters.interpretation: How often extensions resolve to chord tones
parameters.musical_meaning: High in traditional harmony, lower in modern jazz

parameters.name: avoid_note_handling
parameters.description: Skill in avoiding or handling avoid notes
parameters.interpretation: How well avoid notes (e.g., 4 in major) are managed
parameters.musical_meaning: Understanding of extension hierarchy and voice leading

locality_functions.description: Musical locality transformations used for harmony discovery

functions.name: TRANSPOSE
functions.description: Transpose all pitches by constant interval

big_band_agents.name: BrassArranger
big_band_agents.connection: Uses harmony parameters for brass section voicing decisions

big_band_agents.name: VoiceLeadingOptimizer
big_band_agents.connection: Validates smooth voice leading using discovered parameters

big_band_agents.name: SaxVoicing
big_band_agents.connection: Applies voicing spread and drop voicing parameters

tymoczko_geometry.description: Validates chord progressions using neo-Riemannian transformations
tymoczko_geometry.validates: Voice leading efficiency and geometric optimization

usage_notes.training: Parameters discovered through semantic learning on jazz corpus
usage_notes.interpretation: FeatureInterpreter matches learned features to musical concepts
usage_notes.validation: Tymoczko geometric validation ensures musical correctness
